subject: migrate dist to phosphorus-sr1
commit_message:
migrate dist to phosphorus-sr1

add odl phosphorus image and switch for odlsli

Issue-ID: CCSDK-3569
Signed-off-by: Michael DÜrre <michael.duerre@highstreet-technologies.com>
Change-Id: Ib9f06fe9170996b1d5d295808b42d1a6f9838a82
Signed-off-by: Michael DÜrre <michael.duerre@highstreet-technologies.com>

entries.message:

Patch Set 2: Code-Review-1

Voted -1 as reminder that we do not want to upgrade to Phosphorus at this point since there is a known issue with NETCONF/TLS.  We should wait for that to be fixed before we upgrade
